justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's requested times and dates throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: When the initial requested time was unavailable, the agent only reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering alternatives.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the booking process without any unnecessary turns or redundant information requests.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was mostly smooth, but the agent could have offered alternative times when the first request was unavailable.
